reviews.review_description: This game is the ultimate 3d D&D platform. Very very fun once you know what your doing you can make maps play campaigns with friends privately or in sakkara. If you need help and would like to start playing D&D JOIN TAVERNTALESGAME on discord we have a collection of players all playing together in the would of sakkara. We can also help you get start all you need to do is ASK!!!!! this game is also constantly evolving and the creator is adding more and more minis props houses and characters the sky is the limit with this game and your only limited by your mind create whatever world and story you want. What are you elf human minitar orc are you a wizard a barbarian a  ranger be whatever you want and get ready for some fun!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

I recently tried out the demo for Tavern Tales, a table top RPG VR game, and while the concept seemed interesting, I was disappointed to find that there was no demonstration or tutorial. 

As someone who is new to VR gaming, I found myself lost and confused with the controls and gameplay. It was frustrating to not have any guidance on how to play the game or what to expect. 

I think the developers missed a huge opportunity to create a more welcoming and engaging experience for new players. Without any sort of tutorial or demonstration, I can't imagine many people buying Tavern Tales or playing for very long. 

Overall, while the concept of Tavern Tales may be intriguing, the lack of a tutorial or demonstration makes it difficult for new players to get into. Unless the developers add some sort of guidance, I don't see Tavern Tales gaining much traction.
I think that this would be incredible, it’s just needs some work and expansion, maybe even modding tools, after all imagine putting dungeon alchemist maps or hero forged tokens into a vr space

I’d give a higher rating but to really get a feel for it before buying it you need to be able to do a play game demo. The build is good once you play around and get a feel for it. I can see the potential but without a demo of playing a build even just a small walk through would push this to a 4.  I’m not buying a game to demo the full experience. Will see how others rate and review the full game.

reviews.review_title: Im not able to play at all
reviews.review_description: I have horrible stick drift on my left controller so the only way that I can play games is if I'm able to switch locomotion to my right controller but I don't see a setting for that anywhere. Please put the setting to change locomotion hand so me and my friends can use this app to play dnd

reviews.review_title: The game is great in concept but broken
reviews.review_description:
I absolutely love the concept of this game but I have encountered a 3 game breaking bugs: 1. I can place a map item and then the next time I try to place the item the texture breaks an appears bright pink.
2. Dice and a lot of other actual gameplay features just can't be interacted with in any shape or form.
3. The delete and copy button do not function at all.
I know the game is in app lab still but it's just annoying.

reviews.review_title: Cant join other people can’t figure out
reviews.review_description:
I couldn’t delete anything and couldn’t join other people
Can some one tell me how

the copy and delete buttons do work you need to create a game. Go on there player portal and log in the create a game to dm to do this create a character the character is in the create character section and you need a irl for the game you are doing eg d5e the irl didn’t have to work to create a game you just need one then configure it to your likings then play the game and it will work.problems music didn’t work and no combat system((just a suggestion )
I'm allowed to place things and go through the menus, but that's about it...where's the tutorial? Delete? MORE!? I'd like to know what I'm buying!!
I cant do anything, ive made an account but cant invite people. When i look for a YouTube tutorial it shows that it spawns them somewhere else than me, please help me

developer_response.body: Hello, The demo is offline only. You can still build maps and check out the tools available, but online play is limited to the Full version
